global_context.scene_description: A bold advertising graphic on a solid black background. At the top center is a white HVAC company logo reading 'ASH' in a stylized format with 'COOLING & HEATING' beneath it. Below the logo, large bold uppercase text reads 'SUMMER' in bright red color, and directly below that 'BLOWOUT SALE' in white. In the center-lower area of the image is a photograph of a new, clean, silver-gray commercial HVAC package unit, shown at a slight three-quarter angle with a subtle drop shadow beneath it grounding it on the black background. Across the very bottom of the image is a solid bright red horizontal banner spanning the full width, containing bold white uppercase text reading '$1,400 OFF NEW AC SYSTEMS — LIMITED TIME'.

composition.camera_angle: Eye-level, slight three-quarter angle on product
composition.focal_point: The headline text 'SUMMER BLOWOUT SALE' and the HVAC unit together
